title: 10 Teas for Athletes to Overcome Jock Itch
description: Plantago major teas have been used to help with jock itch due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The tea contains compounds like aucubin, which has been shown to reduce inflammation and fight off fungal infections. Aucubin is a type of iridoid glycoside that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat skin conditions.
